targets.boundary: Company-wide, covering Apple’s entire value chain (Scopes 1, 2, and 3).
targets.notes: Apple’s 2030 climate roadmap calls for a 75% absolute reduction in its overall greenhouse gas footprint between 2015 and 2030, with remaining emissions addressed via carbon removal.
targets.title: 75% reduction in total carbon footprint by 2030 vs 2015

targets.boundary: Company-wide net-zero target covering all operations, manufacturing supply chain, and product life cycle (Scopes 1, 2, and 3).
targets.notes: Apple targets net-zero greenhouse gas emissions across its entire value chain by 2030, achieved through emissions reductions and carbon removal for residual emissions.
targets.title: Net-zero (carbon neutral) across business, supply chain, and product life cycle by 2030
